# daytona_docker_registry_push_access (Data Source)

Reads temporary Daytona Docker registry credentials for pushing snapshots.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_docker_registry_push_access" "example" {
  organization_id = "organization-id"
  region_id       = "region-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID. Defaults to the provider-level organization when configured.
- `region_id` (String) Daytona region ID where the pushed snapshot will be available. Defaults to the organization default region.

### Read-Only

- `expires_at` (String) Credential expiration timestamp.
- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `project` (String) Registry project ID.
- `registry_id` (String) Registry ID.
- `registry_url` (String) Registry URL.
- `secret` (String, Sensitive) Temporary registry secret.
- `username` (String, Sensitive) Temporary registry username.
